## Summary

What does this PR do? One-sentence summary, then 2-3 bullet points if needed.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Changes

- List of specific changes

## Testing

How did you verify this works? Include:

- [ ] Manual testing steps you ran
- [ ] OS / Node / browser combinations tested
- [ ] Any edge cases checked

## Screenshots / GIFs

If this changes the UI, attach a before/after.

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the `[tag]` logging convention (no silent `catch {}`)
- [ ] I've updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] I've not added any new external dependencies (or I've explained why one is needed in the description)
- [ ] My commits do not include AI co-author trailers (if you used an AI assistant, disclose it in the PR description, not the commit metadata)
